en: "Has not man a hard service on earth, and are not his days like the days of a hired hand?
zh: “人在世上怎能沒有勞役呢？ 他的日子不像雇工的日子嗎？

en: Like a slave who longs for the shadow, and like a hired hand who looks for his wages,
zh: 正如僕人切慕暮影， 又像雇工盼望工價。

en: so I am allotted months of emptiness, and nights of misery are apportioned to me.
zh: 照樣，我有空虛的歲月， 也有勞苦的黑夜為我派定。

en: When I lie down I say, 'When shall I arise?' But the night is long, and I am full of tossing till the dawn.
zh: 我躺下的時候，就說： ‘我甚麼時候起來？’ 然而，長夜漫漫，我輾轉反側，直到黎明。

en: My flesh is clothed with worms and dirt; my skin hardens, then breaks out afresh.
zh: 我的肉體以蟲子和土塊為衣裳， 我的皮膚裂開又流膿。

en: My days are swifter than a weaver's shuttle and come to their end without hope.
zh: 我過的日子比梭還要快， 在毫無盼望之中而結束。

en: "Remember that my life is a breath; my eye will never again see good.
zh: 求你記念我的性命不過是一口氣， 我的眼必不再看見福樂。

en: The eye of him who sees me will behold me no more; while your eyes are on me, I shall be gone.
zh: 看我的，他的眼再也看不到我， 你的眼要看我，我已經不在了。

en: As the cloud fades and vanishes, so he who goes down to Sheol does not come up;
zh: 雲彩怎樣消散逝去， 照樣，人下陰間也不再上來。

en: he returns no more to his house, nor does his place know him anymore.
zh: 他不再回自己的家， 故鄉再也不認識他。

en: "Therefore I will not restrain my mouth; I will speak in the anguish of my spirit; I will complain in the bitterness of my soul.
zh: 因此，我不再禁止我的口， 我要說出靈裡的憂愁， 傾訴心中的痛苦。

en: Am I the sea, or a sea monster, that you set a guard over me?
zh: 我豈是海洋或是海怪， 你竟然設守衛防備我？

en: When I say, 'My bed will comfort me, my couch will ease my complaint,'
zh: 我若說：‘我的床必安慰我， 我的榻必減輕我的苦情’，

en: then you scare me with dreams and terrify me with visions,
zh: 你就用夢驚擾我， 又用異象驚嚇我，

en: so that I would choose strangling and death rather than my bones.
zh: 以致我寧可窒息而死， 也不肯保留我這一身的骨頭。

en: I loathe my life; I would not live forever. Leave me alone, for my days are a breath.
zh: 我厭惡自己，不願永遠活下去。 任憑我吧，因為我的日子都是空虛的。

en: What is man, that you make so much of him, and that you set your heart on him,
zh: 人算甚麼，你竟看他為大， 又把他放在心上；

en: visit him every morning and test him every moment?
zh: 每天早晨你都鑒察他， 每時每刻你也試驗他。

en: How long will you not look away from me, nor leave me alone till I swallow my spit?
zh: 你到甚麼時候才轉眼不看我， 任憑我咽下唾沫呢？

en: If I sin, what do I do to you, you watcher of mankind? Why have you made me your mark? Why have I become a burden to you?
zh: 鑒察世人的主啊！ 我若犯了罪，跟你有甚麼關係呢？ 你為甚麼把我當作箭靶， 使我以自己為重擔呢？

en: Why do you not pardon my transgression and take away my iniquity? For now I shall lie in the earth; you will seek me, but I shall not be."
zh: 你為甚麼不赦免我的過犯， 除去我的罪孽呢？ 現在我快要躺臥在塵土中， 那時你尋找我，我卻不在了。”
